rules.name: Authentication Anomaly Burst
rules.defensive_objective: Detect repeated authentication failure patterns that may require account review.
rules.triage_hint: Review user, host, timestamp clustering, and whether the account behavior deviates from the expected baseline.
rules.safety_boundary: Synthetic defensive signal only; no credential attack instructions are included.

rules.name: Unexpected Execution Context
rules.defensive_objective: Identify process-context deviations that may indicate suspicious execution behavior.
rules.triage_hint: Review process lineage, user context, host role, and whether the execution path is expected.
rules.safety_boundary: No process injection, exploitation, or evasion procedure is provided.

rules.name: Unusual Outbound Pattern
rules.defensive_objective: Detect rare or unusual outbound communication patterns in synthetic telemetry.
rules.triage_hint: Review destination rarity, frequency, source host role, and whether the activity matches expected service behavior.
rules.safety_boundary: No scanning, exfiltration, or unauthorized network testing instructions are included.

rules.name: Sensitive Access Pattern
rules.defensive_objective: Detect access patterns involving sensitive synthetic paths or unusual access sequences.
rules.triage_hint: Review user role, host context, accessed resource category, and whether the access is expected.
rules.safety_boundary: No real sensitive paths, extraction steps, or misuse instructions are included.

rules.name: Rare Privileged Operation
rules.defensive_objective: Detect rare administrative actions that may require privileged activity review.
rules.triage_hint: Review whether the action was expected, approved, and consistent with the administrator's normal behavior.
rules.safety_boundary: No privilege escalation steps or administrative abuse instructions are included.

rules.name: Abnormal API Frequency
rules.defensive_objective: Detect abnormal API frequency patterns in synthetic request telemetry.
rules.triage_hint: Review request volume, user context, endpoint category, and whether rate behavior matches expected usage.
rules.safety_boundary: No abuse workflow, bypass logic, or unauthorized automation guidance is included.
